project.name: openai-erdos-eq22-reproduction
project.full_name: OpenAI Erdős Unit-Distance Disproof: Eq. (2.2) Executable Reproduction
project.canonical_statement: Independent Python reproduction for the 2026 OpenAI/Sawin disproof of the Erdős unit-distance conjecture: mpmath-200-bit check of remarks PDF equation (2.2), matching the published value at 0.014% relative error.

design_invariants.label: mpmath-precision-lock
design_invariants.statement: Catastrophic cancellation occurs when evaluating equation (2.2) in standard float64. Must use mpmath with at least 200-bit precision.

binding.origin_episode: EXP-052: Initial float64 evaluation collapsed to zero due to underflow in multi-quadratic exponent calculations.

design_invariants.label: no-tampering-unmodified-json
design_invariants.statement: Raw analysis JSON data from the verification run must remain unedited to preserve third-party auditable provenance.

binding.origin_episode: EXP-053: Discovered during EQA conversion that any modification to raw values breaks external verification trust boundaries.

operation_meta.bootstrap_note: MICA package established to enforce numerical precision and provenance integrity of the Erdős disproof reproduction.
